---

<div align="center">
    <h2>• overview •</h2>
</div>

<details>
  <summary>What is Arch-Hyperland-v3aeonic?</summary>

  - Personal Hyprland dotfiles tuned for **Arch Linux**
  - A custom graphical shell with dynamic **Material You** theming
  - Built around **Quickshell** for maximum widget flexibility
  - **NOT** a full system installer — no GPU drivers, zram, bootloader tweaks, etc.
  - Every install step is shown before running — fully transparent

</details>

<details>
  <summary>✨ Features</summary>

  - **Dynamic Material You theming** — wallpaper → full system color palette via `matugen`
  - **App Overview** — live window previews of all open apps
  - **AI Integration** — Gemini, Ollama, and local model support built-in
  - **Screen Tools** — on-screen translation, anti-flashbang, Google Lens integration
  - **Quickshell Shell** — status bar, sidebars, notification center, and more
  - **Fish shell + Starship** prompt — a polished terminal experience
  - **Transparent setup** — every command shown before execution

</details>

<details>
  <summary>🚀 Installation</summary>

  > ⚠️ _New to Arch/Hyprland? Expect a learning curve — this is a power-user setup._

  **One-liner install:**
  ```bash
  bash <(curl -s https://raw.githubusercontent.com/cyberaeonic/Arch-Hyperland-v3aeonic/main/setup)
  ```

  **Manual clone & install:**
  ```bash
  git clone https://github.com/cyberaeonic/Arch-Hyperland-v3aeonic.git
  cd Arch-Hyperland-v3aeonic
  ./setup install
  ```

  **Essential Keybinds:**

  | Keybind | Action |
  |---|---|
  | `Super` + `/` | Show all keybinds |
  | `Super` + `Enter` | Open terminal |
  | `Super` + `Q` | Close active window |
  | `Super` + `Space` | App launcher |
  | `Super` + `Tab` | Window overview |
  | `Super` + `W` | Change wallpaper |

</details>

<details>
  <summary>🛠️ Software Stack</summary>

  | Software | Purpose |
  |---|---|
  | [Hyprland](https://github.com/hyprwm/hyprland) | Wayland compositor — window management & rendering |
  | [Quickshell](https://quickshell.outfoxxed.me/) | QtQuick widget system — bar, sidebars, popups |
  | [Matugen](https://github.com/InioX/matugen) | Material You color generation from wallpaper |
  | [Fish](https://fishshell.com/) | Modern, user-friendly interactive shell |
  | [Kitty](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/) | GPU-accelerated terminal emulator |
  | [Fuzzel](https://codeberg.org/dnkl/fuzzel) | Fast Wayland-native app launcher |
  | [Foot](https://codeberg.org/dnkl/foot) | Lightweight terminal (fallback) |
  | Others | See [deps-info.md](sdata/deps-info.md) |

</details>

This project is a heavily customized fork of [cyberaeonic/Arch-Hyperland-v3aeonic](https://github.com/cyberaeonic/Arch-Hyperland-v3aeonic). Huge thanks to:

- [@cyber](https://github.com/cyber) — the original genius behind these dotfiles
- [@clsty](https://github.com/clsty) — install script & wiki maintainer
- [@midn8hustlr](https://github.com/midn8hustlr) — color generation improvements
- [@outfoxxed](https://github.com/outfoxxed/) — Quickshell developer & community support
- Quickshell community: [Soramane](https://github.com/caelestia-dots/shell/), [FridayFaerie](https://github.com/FridayFaerie/quickshell), [nydragon](https://github.com/nydragon/nysh)
